case_title: DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY VS. NATALIYA TOROSYAN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-18-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT TOROSYAN, NATALIYA
